organization.name: Kumbhira Green Rural Welfare Society
organization.registration: Registered in 2015 under West Bengal Societies Registration Act, 1961
organization.type: Non Government Organization, voluntary service oriented charitable society
organization.tagline: Hope, dignity and sustainable livelihoods for rural and urban communities.

contact.address: Vill- Kumbhira, P.O.- Sabdalpur, P.S.- Baishnab Nagar, Dist.- Malda, PIN- 732201, West Bengal

hero.title: Building self-reliant villages with skill, awareness and human values
hero.text: Kumbhira Green Rural Welfare Society works with poor and needy communities through capacity building, education, health awareness, cultural development and eco-friendly livelihood programmes.

vision: Our vision is to give hope and help to the poor section of society through capacity building and skill development, without creating environmental pollution and while maintaining human values.
mission: Our mission is to create self-reliant villages without disturbing eco-harmony and cultural heritage by making people aware of economic, social and socio-political issues affecting village life. The organization works to remove poverty, unawareness and illiteracy by enriching knowledge and upgrading skills for secure sustainable livelihoods in rural and urban areas.
status: Kumbhira Green Rural Welfare Society is a non-profit, non-government, voluntary service oriented charitable organization. It works for poor and needy people without distinction of caste, colour, creed or religion.

programmes.title: Educational Development
programmes.text: Learning support, awareness sessions and book distribution for poor students.

programmes.title: Women Health Awareness
programmes.text: Community meetings and health awareness programmes for women and families.

programmes.title: Jute Handicraft Training
programmes.text: Skill development programmes that help women and youth build livelihood opportunities.

programmes.title: Cultural Programmes
programmes.text: Activities that preserve local heritage, community values and social participation.

programmes.title: Environmental Programmes
programmes.text: Eco-harmony awareness and community action for a cleaner, greener village life.

programmes.title: Social Awareness
programmes.text: Awareness on economic, social and socio-political issues affecting rural life.
